---
name: Content fix or correction
about: Report an incorrect answer, a typo, a broken link, or an out-of-date entry
title: "[fix] "
labels: [content, fix]
---

## Where

- **File:** <!-- e.g. knowledge/backend.md -->
- **Entry:** <!-- e.g. ### 12. Idempotency keys -->
- **Language:** <!-- en / zh -->

## What's wrong

<!-- Describe the error: incorrect explanation, wrong complexity, broken link, typo, stale info. -->

## Suggested correction

<!-- What should it say instead? A source/reference is helpful but not required. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I checked this isn't already reported.
- [ ] If the `*.md` is wrong, the matching `*.zh.md` may need the same fix (and vice versa).
